name: Strapi
description: The leading open-source headless CMS, 100% JavaScript/TypeScript, fully customizable, and developer-first

description.value: The leading open-source headless CMS, 100% JavaScript/TypeScript, fully customizable, and developer-first

license.comment: MIT for Community Edition; Enterprise Edition components have proprietary license

cms-type.comment: API-first headless CMS; no built-in frontend rendering

deployment-model.comment: Self-hosted open source or Strapi Cloud managed service

database-support.comment: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQLite supported. MongoDB and cloud-native databases not supported

api-type.comment: REST API built-in; GraphQL via official plugin

multi-tenancy.comment: No built-in multi-tenancy; each project requires separate installation

static-site-generation.comment: Works as content source for static site generators like Next.js, Gatsby, Astro

edge-deployment.comment: Strapi Cloud includes global CDN; self-hosted can deploy behind CDN

content-types.comment: Content-Type Builder allows creating custom collection types and single types

custom-fields.comment: 16+ built-in field types plus custom field plugins

field-types.comment: Text, Rich Text (Blocks/Markdown), Number, Date, Media, Relation, Boolean, JSON, Email, Enumeration, UID, Components, Dynamic Zones

content-relationships.comment: 6 relation types: one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-one, many-to-many, one-way, many-way

nested-components.comment: Components (reusable field groups) and Dynamic Zones (flexible component containers)

localization.comment: Built-in Internationalization (i18n) plugin for multi-language content

content-validation.comment: Built-in validation for required fields, min/max length, regex patterns, unique values

embedded-interactives.comment: No built-in support for embedding interactive widgets; content is delivered via API

content-versioning.comment: Content History feature tracks and restores versions; available on Growth/Enterprise plans

draft-publish.comment: Built-in draft and published states with separate tabs in UI

scheduled-publishing.comment: Via Releases feature (schedule bundled content) or Publisher community plugin

approval-workflows.comment: Review Workflows available on Enterprise plan; community plugins available

content-locking.comment: No built-in content locking to prevent concurrent editing

audit-logging.comment: Audit Logs track actions within CMS; available on paid plans

media-library.comment: Built-in Media Library for images, videos, audio, and documents

image-transformations.comment: Basic image processing; advanced transforms via Cloudinary or other plugins

external-media-storage.comment: Plugins available for S3, Cloudinary, and other providers

video-support.comment: Native video upload supported in Media Library

svg-support.comment: SVG files can be uploaded to Media Library

role-based-access.comment: Built-in RBAC with customizable roles and permissions

granular-permissions.comment: Permissions can be set per content-type and action (create, read, update, delete)

sso-saml.comment: SSO available on Enterprise plan; supports Active Directory, Okta, Auth0, Keycloak

team-collaboration.comment: No built-in commenting or assignment features in core product

audience-restrictions.comment: API authentication with JWT or providers; content access can be restricted programmatically

typescript-sdk.comment: Full TypeScript support; auto-generated types for content types

content-type-sdk.comment: Content types can be defined in code via CLI generators

cli-tools.comment: Comprehensive CLI for project scaffolding, code generation, data export/import, and admin management

local-development.comment: Full local development with SQLite; strapi develop with hot-reload

webhooks.comment: Built-in webhooks for content lifecycle events

plugin-system.comment: Extensible plugin system with Strapi Market marketplace

admin-ui-customization.comment: Admin panel is fully customizable via plugins and configuration

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive docs with API reference, tutorials, and guides; separate CMS and Cloud documentation

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official starters and integrations for Next.js, Nuxt, Gatsby, Astro; works with any frontend

search-integration.comment: Built-in filtering and sorting; Algolia and Meilisearch plugins available

preview-mode.comment: Live Preview feature for draft content in frontend

ecommerce-integration.comment: Integrations available for Stripe, Snipcart; commonly used as headless backend for e-commerce

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; can integrate with external services via custom code

ai-features.comment: Strapi AI for content type generation, media alt-text/captions; available on Growth plan

cdn-included.comment: Strapi Cloud includes global CDN; self-hosted requires separate CDN setup

response-caching.comment: No built-in API response caching; can be implemented via plugins or infrastructure

rate-limits.comment: Self-hosted has no limits; Cloud plans range from 2,500 to 10M API requests per month

global-regions.comment: Strapi Cloud offers global CDN; self-hosted can be deployed in any region

free-tier.comment: Open source self-hosted is free; Strapi Cloud has free tier (2,500 requests/mo, 500 entries)

open-source.comment: Core product is MIT licensed open source

pricing-model.comment: Self-hosted is free; Cloud has free tier plus paid plans ($18-$450/mo) with usage-based overage charges

commercial-support.comment: Enterprise support available; Scale plan includes 99.9% SLA

enterprise-features.comment: Enterprise plan includes SSO, audit logs, review workflows, dedicated support, SLA
